introSection: Lynet (Danish for Lightning) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder harnesses.

fullText:
Lynet (Danish for Lightning) is a steel launched roller coaster located at Fårup Sommerland in Blokhus, Nordjylland, Denmark. It was manufactured by Gerstlauer.



Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder harnesses.
